steps.title: Combine the equations
steps.content: Add the two equations to eliminate $y$: $$(x+5y)+(x-5y)=5+7.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches 6. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so C is correct.
